channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: GM leans into AI to rewrite rules on vehicle design
item.description: Last month, during the company’s earnings call, GM CEO Mary Barra updated the world on the company’s autonomous driving ambitions. General Motors is working on eyes-off, hands-off self-driving technology that will launch in 2028 on the Cadillac Escalade IQ. Such a breakthrough would put it ahead ...

item.title: A Little Good News for Tesla's Big Forgotten Product
item.description: Tesla's Semi is generating serious interest, backed by impressive results -- and potential customers are taking notice.

item.title: Global EV Industry Faces Outsized Risk From Cobalt Supply Disruptions
item.description: Nearly half of EVs still rely on cobalt-based batteries, leaving automakers exposed to supply chain risks despite the growing adoption of cobalt-free LFP batteries by companies like Tesla and BYD.

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) Ascends While Market Falls: Some Facts to Note
item.description: In the closing of the recent trading day, Tesla (TSLA) stood at $405.05, denoting a +1.14% move from the preceding trading day.

item.title: Tesla finally clarifies fatal Texas crash, confirms driver manually overrode acceleration
item.description: Tesla has finally clarified the situation regarding the viral crash in Texas where a Model 3 slammed into a home. CEO Elon Musk replied to reports on Monday that stated the crash was due to the company’s Full Self-Driving or Autopilot suite, which seemed unlikely to those who are familiar with it...

item.title: Ashok: "@elonmusk @kylaschwaberow Yup. In this case, the driver manually overrode self-driving by pressing the accelerator all the way to 100% of the accel pedal in this residential area. They reached a speed of 73 mph during the crash, and had the accelerator pressed even after the crash."
item.description: submitted by /u/komocode_ [link] [comments]

item.title: Buying SpaceX Stock Isn't the Same as Buying Tesla's IPO Back in 2010. There's One Massive Difference
item.description: SpaceX isn't likely to generate the mammoth returns that Tesla has since going public.

item.title: NHTSA probes fatal Tesla crash into Texas home that killed woman
item.description: Federal safety regulators are now investigating the fatal Tesla crash in Katy, Texas, where a Model 3 left a residential road, tore through a brick home, and killed a 76-year-old woman inside. The National Highway Traffic Safety Administration said Monday it is examining the June 20 crash, after ...

item.title: SpaceX makes $20 billion move to optimize its balance sheet
item.description: SpaceX announced today that it commenced its first-ever public bond offering, marking a significant step in the newly public company’s capital markets strategy. The company announced an offering of senior unsecured notes expected to raise at least $20 billion. The move comes just a short time aft...

item.title: Tesla On Autopilot Crashes Into Texas House, Killing One
item.description: On Friday, June 19, 2026, a Tesla Model Y driven by Michael Butler left the road and crashed into a home in Katy, Texas. A 76-year-old woman in the living room was struck by the car. She was airlifted to a hospital and was later pronounced dead.

item.title: SpaceX confirms third massive compute deal at Colossus data center
item.description: SpaceX confirmed today that it has officially signed its third massive compute deal, providing compute at its Colossus data center in Southaven, Tennessee. Reflection AI will gain immediate access to NVIDIA GB300 chips at SpaceX’s Colossus 2 data center. In return, Reflection will pay SpaceX $150...

item.title: The SpaceX IPO Is Over. History Says Investors Should Do This Next.
item.description: SpaceX now has a market cap well above $2 trillion.

item.title: Redistributing Elon Musk’s $1 Trillion Fortune Would Likely Give Each U.S. Household Just $1,500. Here’s the Math
item.description: On a recent episode of the Peter Schiff Show, economist Peter Schiff took aim at a wealth redistribution proposal floated by Sen. Adam Schiff, using Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) CEO Elon Musk as his case study. Adam Schiff pointed to calculations suggesting that $1 trillion could provide roughly $7,500 to...

item.title: Elon Musk responds to SpaceX’s ESG rating and says its rockets won’t go electric
item.description: It is safe to say SpaceX won’t be going for electric rockets anytime soon. In a characteristically blunt reply on X, SpaceX frontman Elon Musk stated, “Unfortunately, electric rockets are impossible,” following reports that MSCI had assigned SpaceX its lowest possible ESG rating of CCC . The asse...

item.title: Intel (INTC) Lands Google And Tesla Deals As U.S. Takes Equity Stake
item.description: The U.S. government converts a portion of CHIPS Act support into an equity stake in Intel (NasdaqGS:INTC), creating a new public shareholder with policy interests tied to domestic chip production. Intel announces new AI partnerships with Google for long term AI workloads and with Tesla’s TeraFab ...

item.title: India's Tata Electronics hit by cyber breach claiming to expose Apple, Tesla trade secrets
item.description: Tata Electronics said on Monday it had detected a recent "cybersecurity incident", after researchers said World Leaks posted purported component design and specification papers of Apple and Tesla, both customers of the Indian group. Apple was investigating the breach ​and a "full analysis was goi...

item.title: SpaceX Merger Would Hurt Tesla Stock, Jefferies Says. Cathie Wood Adds Tesla.
item.description: The rumor that Elon Musk may merge SpaceX and Tesla will only further disconnect the carmaker's valuation from its performance, Jefferies says. Cathie Wood bought almost 55,000 shares of Tesla on Friday.

item.title: Tesla just trademarked MEGAPOD: here’s what it is
item.description: Tesla just trademarked ‘MEGAPOD’ with the United States Patent and Trademark Office (USPTO), its latest move in what seems to be a hint that the company is incredibly focused on its AI efforts and storage needs as compute increases. The application carries serial number 99893717 and lists the app...

item.title: Why Tesla Fatal Accidents Don’t Matter To The Company’s Success
item.description: A woman in Texas was killed when a Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) crashed into her home. The car was traveling at a high speed. It may be that the driver was using one of Tesla’s self-driving features.

item.title: Tesla's operational gains obscured by widening robotaxi lag and valuation disconnect
item.description: Tesla Inc's (NASDAQ:TSLA) fundamentals are improving in visible ways: vehicle sales accelerating 15% year-on-year, battery storage deployment reaching 11Gwh with $3bn revenue, and auto gross margins recovering to 18.3%. Jefferies analyst sees genuine operational progress. Yet the stock trades...

item.title: How Tesla Investors Are Generating Weekly Income With TSLW Without Selling a Share of TSLA
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) doesn’t pay a dividend, and it probably never will, given that investors would probably prefer that Elon Musk reinvest in some of his new, ambitious ideas. For income investors, it might make sense to own Tesla shares alongside some other dividend-paying securities in a “barbe...

item.title: Did Elon Musk Just Hint a SpaceX-Tesla Merger Is Imminent?
item.description: The market’s attention has been fixed on SpaceX‘s (NASDAQ:SPCX) historic public debut and the company’s rapid climb toward a valuation exceeding $2 trillion. Yet the bigger story may not be the IPO itself. It may be what Elon Musk does next.

item.title: Tesla's Missing 10,000: Is Optimus Falling Behind The Robotics Pack?
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) is valued at more than $1.2 trillion. The automotive business holding that number up is shrinking. Full-year 2025 revenue came in at $94.8 billion, down 3 percent, the company's first annual revenue decline ever.

item.title: Chinese sodium-ion battery matches Tesla on build quality, teardown finds
item.description: A commercial sodium-ion battery from Chinese manufacturer Hina matches Tesla’s lithium-ion cells on manufacturing quality and internal design, according to an independent teardown published in the Cell Press journal Cell Reports Physical Science . Researchers at Germany’s RWTH Aachen University m...

item.title: Should You Buy Tesla Stock Before July 2?
item.description: There are signs Tesla's struggling electric-vehicle business is turning around.

item.title: Jefferies Warns Tesla Could Trade Like SpaceX Proxy
item.description: The firm trimmed its Tesla target to $375 and flagged merger speculation as a new risk.

item.title: JD Vance Says Trump Backs Government Stakes In AI Giants, But Musk And Cuban Push Back: 'Better Just To Send Money Directly'
item.description: Vice President JD Vance said that President Donald Trump supports the U.S. government taking ownership stakes in major artificial intelligence companies, likening the idea to a sovereign wealth fund-style approach, while Elon Musk countered that direct cash payments to Americans would work better...

item.title: Tesla job postings in India signal South Asia hub strategy, says GlobalData
item.description: Signs from the job market that Tesla is seriously commited to investing for future business growth in South Asia.

item.title: Tesla's Driver-Assistance Tech Faces New Test
item.description: Investigators reviewing whether driver-assistance system was active

item.title: Tesla rival says Elon Musk still has one major edge
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) has taken a lot of criticism for its self-driving ambitions. Regulators have cast doubt on the company’s safety assertions. Critics say Full Self-Driving is still an overhyping of what the system can perform.

item.title: Tesla FSD Finally Reached Europe. Now Speed Limits May Slow Its Expansion
item.description: Sweden has a problem with FSD breaking the speed limit on demand,

item.title: Jefferies Lowers Tesla Target and Highlights Potential SpaceX Tracking Stock Risk
item.description: Jefferies has reduced its price target on Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) to $375 and identified what it sees as an emerging structural risk for shareholders: the possibility that expectations surrounding a future combination with SpaceX (NASDAQ:SPCX) could cause Tesla shares to increasingly trade as a proxy...

item.title: Jefferies sees downside risk for Tesla stock, warns of SpaceX tracker risk
item.description: Investing.com - Jefferies has trimmed its Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) price target to $375 and flagged a new structural risk for the stock: that growing market consensus around a Tesla-SpaceX merger could effectively transform TSLA shares into a de facto SpaceX (NASDAQ:SPCX) tracking stock.

item.title: ACHR Stock Slips Premarket: Archer Aviation CEO Reportedly Pitches Tesla-Like Future For Air Taxis
item.description: The company’s CEO, Adam Goldstein, takes an optimistic outlook on the future of air taxis.

item.title: SpaceX is launching a secret spacecraft that could change how things are made in space
item.description: SpaceX is targeting Tuesday, June 23 for the first flight of Starfall, a reentry capsule the company has developed almost entirely in private. The Falcon 9 launch window opens at 6:43 a.m. ET from Space Launch Complex 40 at Cape Canaveral Space Force Station, with a backup window available the sa...

item.title: Musk Effectively Bought Cursor At Half Price In An 'Incredible Deal,' Says Chamath — Tesla-SpaceX Merger Is Next
item.description: He estimated that if SpaceX grows from $1 trillion to $2 trillion, the stock-based deal becomes far cheaper in hindsight.

item.title: Are the three mega-AI IPOs about to break the market?
item.description: SpaceX just had its IPO, with Anthropic and OpenAI both set to launch initial public offerings soon — their collective financial weight threatens to burst the AI bubble

item.title: Elon Musk Just Lifted His Tesla Voting Stake to Nearly 20%. Could a SpaceX Merger Be Next?
item.description: Does consolidating this much control clear the path to the biggest merger in history?

item.title: Cathie Wood Loads Up on SpaceX Stock. She Is Betting Big That Musk’s AI Vision Will Pay Off.
item.description: Cathie Wood’s aggressive buying signals strong confidence in SpaceX, but investors must decide whether Elon Musk’s ambitious AI vision can ultimately justify the company’s lofty valuation.

item.title: Tesla Semi spotted with ground truth validation equipment as launch looms
item.description: The Tesla Semi was spotted mounted with ground truth validation equipment as the company nears its looming launch. The Semi is Tesla’s Class 8 all-electric truck, and has been utilized in its earlier stages by many companies like PepsiCo. and Frito-Lay, who have been using it in a pilot program.

item.title: Tesla Has Only 69 Robotaxis In Texas — But They Are Cheap
item.description: Tesla Inc. is getting lapped in the Texas robotaxi race. The question is whether it matters.

item.title: Tesla plans to sell modular AI data center hardware called ‘Megapod’
item.description: Tesla wants to sell modular AI data center hardware, according to a new trademark application for a product called “Megapod.” The filing describes a complete, self-contained computing system for AI workloads — and it lands less than a year after Tesla killed Dojo, its only in-house AI training co...

item.title: A SpaceX-Tesla Merger Could Manufacture A $5 Trillion Giant: Here's What Prediction Markets Say
item.description: Elon Musk’s next move could be a SpaceX-Tesla merger big enough to challenge Nvidia Corp. for the title of most valuable company on Earth. Just three sessions into its IPO, SpaceX has already surged nearly 50% to roughly $2.6 trillion, leaving Tesla Inc.

item.title: Investors Should Be Highly Skeptical About Elon Musk’s Revenue Targets for SpaceX
item.description: Elon Musk has a number of gigantic accomplishments, but he also has a long history of overpromising and underdelivering.

item.title: Prediction: SpaceX Stock Could Crash by 50% by 2027
item.description: Shares soared on their debut, but it probably won't last.

item.title: Is Tesla, Inc. (TSLA) Among the Best EV Stocks to Invest In According to Hedge Funds?
item.description: Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) is among the Best EV Stocks. On June 17, Reuters reported that the Dutch road authority said about Tesla, Inc.

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) Faces EU FSD Split As Musk Lifts Voting Stake To 20%
item.description: Sweden has urged the EU to block Tesla’s Full Self-Driving rollout unless the feature that lets vehicles exceed speed limits is disabled, as an EU-wide vote approaches. Denmark has tentatively cleared FSD under Dutch regulatory rules, creating a split in European treatment of Tesla’s driver-assis...

item.title: Europe's First 500 kW V4 Supercharger Is Here - And It's in Norway
item.description: submitted by /u/RoamingNorway [link] [comments]

item.title: Can SpaceX Deliver Tesla-Level Returns? The Bull and the Bear Case
item.description: The company's first week on the market was a smashing success.

item.title: Tesla driver says it was on Autopilot before fatal Texas home crash
item.description: A driver told Harris County investigators that his Tesla was on Autopilot before it left a residential road in Katy, Texas, crashed through the brick wall of a home, and killed a 76-year-old woman inside. The crash happened around 8 p.m. Friday in the 21300 block of Rose Hollow Lane, according to...
